final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout, immersive edge-to-edge with hero product centered
Subject: must include a flagship smartphone as the hero product, prominently displayed
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, visually striking backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high-impact, visually arresting atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, premium brand-reveal direction — exact palette and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, premium surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (brand wordmark)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format; must read as a native mobile full-screen ad screenshot
Avoid:
